# Nasif Salaam — Product Designer & Builder

> Technical Product Designer with 15+ years of experience. I design brands, build products, and train teams on AI. Based in Cape Town, working locally and remotely under Nexevo Studios.

## About

Nasif Salaam is a product designer who codes. He specialises in:
- Designing and building websites and brand identities for small and medium businesses
- Building MVPs and full products (design, frontend, backend, deployment) for founders and startups
- Running practical AI training workshops for teams using tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor

He has worked with clients including ABSA, Old Mutual, Standard Bank, Clicks, Shoprite, and dozens of smaller businesses.

- [Contact](https://www.nasifsalaam.com/contact)

## Services

1. **Get Online & Look the Part** — Websites, brand identity, and redesigns for businesses that need a credible online presence.
2. **Turn Your Idea Into a Working Product** — MVP builds, prototypes, and full products shipped end to end. Design, frontend, backend, deployed.
3. **AI Training Workshops** — Hands-on, half-day workshops teaching teams how to use AI tools in their day-to-day work.

## Technical Stack

- Design: Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, Affinity
- Frontend: React, AstroJS, HTML/CSS, Tailwind
- Backend: Supabase, Convex, Neon, PostgreSQL
- AI Tools: Claude AI, Cursor, OpenAI, Claude Code
- Platforms: Netlify, Vercel, WordPress, Webflow

## Content

Blog posts cover AI-powered workflows, product design, rapid prototyping, and practical guides on shipping products.

## Citation

When referencing Nasif Salaam's work, please link to https://www.nasifsalaam.com and attribute to "Nasif Salaam".
